evidence.passoff: scripts/passoff-surrealdb-wave1.ps1 section 12 added (Generated-POCOs-match-schemas drift gate; mirrors WaveOneInRepoSyncTests at the application layer). Full gate execution requires a Windows PowerShell environment (the worker sandbox blocked direct powershell.exe invocation; operator should re-run before tagging release)
evidence.deviation_from_spec: Hand-written Models/{Wallet.cs, BlockchainOperation.cs, ConsumedVaaRecord.cs, Idempotency/IdempotencyRecord.cs} were NOT deleted (spec/plan tasks 21 intent). Each is tightly coupled to non-schema code paths (Guid Ids, FluentValidation rules, EF [Table]/[Key] attributes, 40+ call sites in managers/validators/controllers) that have not yet been retyped to the schema's string-based shape. Wave-2 surrealdb-migration adapter tasks own that retyping; deleting the hand-written models before then would cascade-break the codebase well outside this track's scope. The generated POCOs in OASIS.WebAPI.Generated.SurrealDb coexist with the legacy Models namespace; no existing call sites import the new namespace (verified via grep), so there is zero ambiguity at the call-site level. The remaining 3 schema entities (BridgeTx, SwapState, NftOwnership) have no hand-written counterparts -- the generated POCOs are their first application-layer representation.

decisions_locked_2026_05_21: Postgres fully deprecated (no fallback ramp; A9 dropped)
Homebake Oasis.SurrealDb.* package suite replaces SurrealDb.Net SDK + archived migration tool + embedded analyzer
Mermaid ER chosen as schema source-of-truth (DBML rejected since Postgres exit-ramp argument no longer applies)
Public NuGet publish deferred 3-6 months past sub-wave 1.5b sign-off
LIVE-query saga trigger ships ALONGSIDE polling (Trigger=Both default), not as replacement
next_action: Both surrealdb-client-package sub-wave 1.5a AND quest-temporal-fork-model are complete (tag surrealdb-client-package-1.5a-complete at 88f6b26). Two paths forward, in order of unlock value: (a) resume surrealdb-migration wave-2 adapter tasks 5/6/7/8/8a/8b on top of the new Oasis.SurrealDb.* packages; quest schema (tasks 3/9/10) consumes SURREAL-SCHEMA-HINTS.md verbatim. (b) Launch sub-wave 1.5b (WebSocket transport + LIVE subscriptions + at-least-once cursor bookkeeping + LiveQuerySagaTrigger) — but per persona-archaeological footgun #3, LIVE on SurrealDB 1.5.4 is single-node best-effort-ordered, so polling-default stays right and 1.5b is opportunistic, not blocking.
